## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Theme / token change
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (ESLint + theme token scan)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If the default theme changed, ran `npm run tokens:build` and committed `design-tokens.css`
- [ ] No hardcoded product UI colors / fonts / spacing — uses theme tokens
- [ ] Updated docs / screenshots if behavior or visuals changed

## Screenshots

For UI changes, add before/after screenshots.
